# Zara Agent OPC

> Empathetic AI engineering partner with cognitive memory, multi-agent orchestration, and self-improving reflection loops. Built on Model Context Protocol (MCP) + OpenCode.

Created by Aldo Karendra (https://github.com/aldok10, https://linkedin.com/in/aldok10)

## Overview

Zara is a persistent, evolving AI engineering partner that remembers context across sessions, coordinates 10 specialized agents, and improves from real usage. Unlike stateless AI assistants, Zara builds a cognitive model of the developer over time.

Key capabilities:
- 3-layer cognitive memory (episodic/semantic/procedural) with MiniLM-L6-v2 embeddings
- 11 coordinated AI agents with domain expertise (architecture, security, testing, delivery)
- 77-route adaptive skill routing across 100+ engineering skills
- Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) for multi-layer memory retrieval
- Self-improving: outcome-weighted reflection, micro-tool crystallization
- Trust-calibrated memory with source-gated ceilings and temporal decay
- Privacy-aware: automatic secrets detection, data masking

## Architecture

- Runtime: Node.js 22+ with native SQLite (FTS5)
- Protocol: Model Context Protocol (MCP) over stdio
- Storage: SQLite with semantic embeddings (384-dim vectors)
- State: File-based at ~/.zara/ (JSON, JSONL, SQLite)
- Agents: 11 (orchestrator + 10 specialists)
- MCP Tools: 31 across 10 domains (memory, reflection, metrics, session, music, knowledge, audit, project, identity, improve)
- Skills: 100+ global engineering skills
- Knowledge: 294 indexed DevIQ articles with passage-level semantic search

- Repository: https://github.com/aldok10/zara-agent-opc

- Author LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/aldok10

- MCP Spec: https://modelcontextprotocol.io

## Sections

- [README](https://github.com/aldok10/zara-agent-opc/blob/main/README.md): Full documentation, quick start, architecture
- [MCP Server](https://github.com/aldok10/zara-agent-opc/tree/main/tools/mcp): 31 tools implementation
- [Knowledge Base](https://github.com/aldok10/zara-agent-opc/tree/main/knowledge): 294 architecture and engineering articles
- [Skills](https://github.com/aldok10/zara-agent-opc/tree/main/.opencode/skills): 100+ engineering methodology skills
- [Agents](https://github.com/aldok10/zara-agent-opc/tree/main/.opencode/agent): 11 specialized AI agent definitions
- [Plugins](https://github.com/aldok10/zara-agent-opc/tree/main/.opencode/plugin): 13 domain modules (memory, voice, empathy, etc.)
